title: EpicCraft (AvoDarko)
description: A really weird mod for minecraft that adds brainrot, and other things.
body:
Epic Craft is a small but growing minecraft neoforge mod with minor additions to the game. 
Some of these include adding a boss, the jeffy. New food items, like a chocolate bar and an energy drink. There is also a new tree type, a mango tree. You can also ride some new mobs. 
If youre getting bored of the basic minecraft discs, you can try the 2 new songs that have been added so far.
